Description: Unique identifier for the carbon accounting entry
Direct emissions from onsite fuel combustion or process releases
Embodied carbon of materials, manufacturing, transport
End-of-life processing, avoided emissions from services
Adjustment for verified ecological co-benefits (e.g., PFAS removal)
Normalized risk coordinates (0–1) per scope, corridor-gated
Foreign key to EcoCoreParameters rule preventing double-counting
Verified carbon reductions from CEIM mass-avoidance kernels
